# Content Lab

> AI-powered content marketing platform that turns one brand brief into publish-ready blog articles, LinkedIn posts, newsletters, and SEO metadata — synced directly to Framer, WordPress, Notion, Intercom, and Confluence.

## About Content Lab

Content Lab generates long-form articles, comparison pages, and how-to guides grounded in current web data, with built-in tone enforcement (no hype phrases), citation discipline (no fabricated stats), and AI-search-citation structure (definition blocks, FAQ, comparison tables). Articles ship with cover image, inline image, infographic, and JSON-LD schema. One-click publishing to Framer CMS via the official Framer plugin; LinkedIn distribution via per-user RSS feeds.

Built for L&D teams, content marketers, and SaaS founders who need volume + quality without the agency cost.

## Marketing site

- https://www.content-lab.ie/

## App

- https://www.app.content-lab.ie/signup
- https://www.app.content-lab.ie/login
- https://www.app.content-lab.ie/dashboard

## Capabilities

- **AI article generation** — Claude Sonnet 4.6 by default, Opus 4.7 for deep-research pieces, Haiku 4.5 for metadata.
- **Brand-safe tone** — system prompt blocks hype phrases ("game-changing", "revolutionary", etc.) and hollow openers; enforces citation discipline.
- **AI-search-optimised structure** — definition blocks, FAQ sections, comparison tables, "Last updated" line, 40–60 word answer blocks for Perplexity / ChatGPT / Google AI Overviews extraction.
- **Targeted meta descriptions** — separate generator with inputs for keywords, brand strapline, marketing message, USPs, brand tone, and an optional good example to mirror.
- **Multi-platform sync** — Framer plugin (Managed Collection), WordPress, Notion, Intercom, Confluence, Shopify.
- **LinkedIn RSS** — per-user feed; only articles confirmed live in Framer can be enabled (DB trigger enforces this — broken links impossible by construction).
- **MCP server** — `create_article`, `update_article`, `generate_social_post`, etc. Used by Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP clients.

## Integrations

- Framer (CMS sync via plugin)
- LinkedIn (RSS → Zapier → posts)
- WordPress, Notion, Intercom, Confluence, Shopify
- Stripe (billing)
- PostHog (product analytics)
- Resend (email/newsletter)

## Pricing tiers

- Free trial — limited credits
- Starter — 1 Framer collection
- Pro — 5 Framer collections
- Admin — unlimited (internal)
